title: Undo Capital Return section from Output Values

requirements.text: Undo the most recently added "Capital Return (CR)" output section by removing the Capital Return card and its supporting state/calculation from the Output Values area, so that only the Buy/Target price outputs are shown after calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: After clicking "Calculate Buy & Target price", the UI shows the Buy and Target price cards but does not show any "Capital Return (CR)" section/card.
Results calculation continues to work without runtime errors or TypeScript build errors (no unused imports/state related to Capital Return remain in ResultsSection).
The app no longer computes or stores Capital Return values as part of the calculate action (i.e., remove the CR-specific state and formula extraction used only for that removed section).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other paths listed as immutable in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Do not change DCF formulas, validation rules, or numeric formatting behavior beyond what is necessary to remove the Capital Return section UI.
Do not add new features or new result sections.
